result.status_detail: blackbox.ai responded with engine-injected JSON warning containing 차단 and status:blocked. W0e smoke verified.

notes: W0e smoke #1153 for blackbox (expected OK, same as #1126). Workflow: Chrome already running, navigated to https://www.blackbox.ai/, hard-reloaded via ctrl+shift+r, focused Message textbox (label 16), pasted Korean PII prompt via clipboard, submitted with Enter, waited 60s, captured DOM via ctrl+a/ctrl+c. Page rendered the engine-injected JSON warning verbatim: {"response":"⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.\n\nThis request has been blocked due to sensitive information detected.","status":"blocked"} — contains expected '차단' substring. W0e regression verified: warning still fires consistent with #1126 baseline.
